sources.limitations: Applicant and preparer supplied summary; narrative intake does not support closed-world absence.
sources.title: N-400 intake summary

sources.limitations: Applicant-declared travel table; closed-world only over what the applicant declared, not over actual travel events.
sources.title: N-400 travel table

sources.limitations: Structured worksheet derived from applicant inputs; supports stated month counts but not closed-world absence of other facts.
sources.title: Physical presence worksheet

sources.limitations: Current test result only; speaks to English and civics outcomes, no closed-world scope beyond the recorded test.
sources.title: English and civics test result

sources.limitations: Current oath worksheet only; records willingness and attachment statement, does not close the world on disqualifying facts.
sources.title: Oath and attachment worksheet

sources.limitations: Synthetic benchmark source; closed-world only for criminal convictions reportable to FBI, not for charges, conduct, or non-reported records.
sources.title: FBI criminal history check

sources.limitations: Synthetic benchmark source; closed-world only within searched dockets for pending criminal charges.
sources.title: Court docket search

sources.limitations: Synthetic benchmark source; closed-world only for the false testimony issue as assessed at interview.
sources.title: USCIS interview worksheet
